org.bytedeco.pytorch.nccl

Class ProcessGroupNCCL

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.bytedeco.javacpp.Pointer
      • org.bytedeco.pytorch.CustomClassHolder
        • org.bytedeco.pytorch.Backend
          • org.bytedeco.pytorch.nccl.ProcessGroupNCCL
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AutoCloseable

    @Namespace(value="c10d")
 @NoOffset
 @Properties(inherit=torch_nccl.class)
public class ProcessGroupNCCL
extends Backend
